label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 11

extraction.one_line_summary: HERRADA Jesus won from 26-rider breakaway after GANNA Filippo's infernal pace shattered group, then EF's CAICEDO attacked at flamme rouge before being caught.
tactical_patterns: GANNA Filippo rode destructively for THOMAS despite winning TT previous day, showing Ineos willing to burn TT winner as domestique.
CAICEDO Jonathan attacked twice including at flamme rouge from small lead group, forcing THOMAS to close despite GC ambitions.
EVENEPOEL Remco attacked GC group on final climb but SEPP, ROGLIC immediately neutralized, revealing no GC team willing to work yet.
OTTERBROOKS Sean went early from GC group suggesting top-10 defense tactics, forcing CARTHY Hugh to respond to protect position.

rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: rode tempo destructively for Thomas day after TT win, showing exceptional recovery and team commitment on 14-16% ramps
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: closed Caicedo's flamme rouge move while controlling final, positioning for top-10 GC push despite being older GC rider
rider_signals.CAICEDO Jonathan: positive: attacked twice from lead group including at flamme rouge, showing aggressive tactics from reduced breakaway
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: attacked GC group but immediately marked by Sepp and Roglic, revealing peloton unwilling to let moves go pre-Tourmalet
rider_signals.HERRADA Jesus: positive: took Spain's first stage victory on 14-16% finish with family waiting, demonstrating strong finishing kick from reduced break
